title: pkg/spec: fix a confusing error message
body: When we try, but fail, to load the default seccomp profile, say that, instead of suggesting that we tried to load a profile with no name.

comments.body: Looks like two of the tests were automatically canceled here?  We'd weird CI problems on Bulidah today, I'm blaming @nalind for both!  ;^)
